name: Cashew Chili
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large saucepan or Dutch oven, melt the butter.
2. Saute the onion, celery, and garlic until crisp-tender, about 10 minutes.
3. Add the beans, tomato sauce, chili powder, hot pepper sauce, cumin, garlic, basil, oregano, bay leaf, and black pepper to a boil.
4. Reduce heat and simmer for 30 minutes to blend flavors.
5. Stir in the raisins and cashews; continue to simmer until the raisins are plump and the cashews are tender, about 20 minutes.
6. Ladle into bowls and top each serving with grated cheese. Serve with additional cheese.
